All functions

As endpoint

Calculate contrast and p value

Calculate time series metrics

Calculate time series metrics from a SpatRaster

Calculate Vegatation Index
collate_matching_layers()
Collate matching layers
create_control_candidates()
Create candidate control raster

Create median value composite image
cube_composite.medoid()
Create medoid composite image

Composite cube
dem()
Extract Digital Elevation Model
dem2cube()
Read DEM as data cube

Image composites from STAC

Harmonize STAC endpoint/collection-specific band names of data cubes
eo_harm_bandnames()
Harmonize STAC endpoint/collection specific band names
eo_mapBand()
Map band
eo_mask.cube()
EO mask for data cube
eo_mask.rast()
EO mask for spatRaster
eo_maskLyrName.stac()
Retrieve mask layer name

Search STAC EO data for Planetary Computer

Search STAC EO data

Vegetation Index composites
evaluate_matching()
Matching evaluation
extractMatches()
Extract matches values from SpatRaster/data cube
lulc()
Extract Land Use / Land Cover data
matchCI()
Control-impact matching
osm_distance()
OpenStreetMap distance
osm_distance_places()
OpenStreetMap distance to places
osm_distance_roads()
OpenStreetMap distance to roads
stac_auth()
STAC authentication
test_multicollinearity()
Test multicollinearity of matching covariates
utm_zone()
Given a spatial object, calculate the UTM zone of the centroid

Wildlife circles data
